sections.title: Architecture & Environment Management
sections.description: Multi-environment setup with immutable builds and promotion workflow

requirements.description: Support DEV, TEST, and PROD environments with distinct ports (8000, 8181, 8282)
acceptance_criteria: TEST runs on port 8181 with UAT features
PROD runs on port 8282 with ngrok exposure

requirements.description: Immutable build system with timestamped artifacts
acceptance_criteria: Build manifests include source hash and metadata

requirements.description: PowerShell automation scripts for build/promote/rollback operations

sections.title: Data Model & RAG Implementation
sections.description: Hybrid RAG system with AstraDB integration and multi-pass ingestion

requirements.description: Multi-pass ingestion pipeline (Parse → Enrich → Graph Compile)
acceptance_criteria: Pass A: Parse PDF to chunks with primary metadata
Pass B: Dictionary normalization and secondary metadata
Pass C: Graph workflow compilation and updates

requirements.description: Metadata preservation with page-accurate references
acceptance_criteria: Chunk metadata includes page, section, source identifiers
Page numbering matches original print versions

requirements.description: Dynamic dictionary system for cross-system normalization
acceptance_criteria: Cross-system term mapping (e.g., D&D vs Pathfinder)

sections.title: Graph Workflows
sections.description: Multi-step task orchestration using graph-based workflows

requirements.description: Graph workflow engine with node/edge execution
acceptance_criteria: Workflows stored as graphs with nodes and transitions
Node metadata includes prompts and dictionary references

requirements.description: Character Creation workflow implementation
acceptance_criteria: Integration with RAG for legal options

requirements.description: Intelligent routing between RAG and workflow modes
acceptance_criteria: Fallback to OpenAI training data when appropriate

sections.title: Admin User Interface
sections.description: Administrative interface for system management and monitoring

requirements.description: System Status dashboard with health checks
acceptance_criteria: Health checks for Astra Vector, Astra Graph, OpenAI
ngrok public URL display for PROD environment

requirements.description: Ingestion Console with progress tracking
acceptance_criteria: Single file and bulk upload capabilities
Real-time progress for each ingestion pass

requirements.description: Dictionary management interface
Regression test and bug bundle management
acceptance_criteria: List and view regression test cases
View and download bug bundles from thumbs-down feedback

sections.title: User Interface
sections.description: End-user interface for querying the TTRPG system

requirements.description: Query interface with performance metrics
acceptance_criteria: Text input field with submit functionality

requirements.description: LCARS/Star Wars retro terminal visual design
acceptance_criteria: Background art integration from provided image
Retro terminal aesthetic with appropriate color palette

requirements.description: Response area with multimodal support
Memory mode selection
UAT feedback system with automatic regression creation
acceptance_criteria: Thumbs-up creates regression test case automatically
Test cases include query, context, expected outcomes

requirements.description: Bug bundle generation from negative feedback
acceptance_criteria: Bundle includes query, trace, metadata, user feedback
Token usage and performance metrics captured

requirements.description: DEV environment testing gates
acceptance_criteria: All approved feature requests must pass
Superseded requirements ignored only after approval

sections.title: Requirements Management
sections.description: Immutable requirements and feature request handling

requirements.description: Immutable requirements storage system
acceptance_criteria: Requirements stored as timestamped JSON files
Never edit existing requirement documents in place

requirements.description: Feature request approval workflow
acceptance_criteria: Feature requests stored with approval status
Decision trail logged for audit purposes

requirements.description: JSON schema validation for requirements and requests
